title: Instances
description: One card per registered DCC backend. Use the links to open the adapter HTTP host, MCP streamable endpoint, or /docs when the host exposes it.
update.aria: Check and stage server update for {name}
update.help: Checks the server manifest and stages the binary when an update exists. No manual CLI command is required.
update.label: Update
update.restartRequired: Restart this DCC backend to use the staged server.
update.status.binaryNotFound: {binary} is not listed in the update manifest.
update.status.endpointUnavailable: Update API is unavailable. Restart the gateway to load the new admin endpoint.
update.status.manifestError: Could not read the update manifest: {message}
